scripts.start: node scripts/build-client-for-heroku.js http://localhost:3000 && npm run move-build && cd server && npm install && node index.js
scripts.build-client: cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.move-build: rm -f server/public/index.html && rm -rf server/public/assets && cp -r client/dist/* server/public/ && echo 'move-build: copied (data/ preserved)'
